overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character exploring an ancient Egyptian/Greek temple complex in Alexandria at sunset. The character walks through colonnades, courtyards with banquet tables, and gardens with obelisks, with the Lighthouse of Alexandria visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered colonnade with statues and lighthouse view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the colonnade toward the lighthouse in the distance

entered.detail: ornate stone building wall with carved statues in niches
classical statue embedded in the building wall
tall white tower with smoke rising from the top visible through the columns
massive dark stone columns with decorative bases
intricate geometric tile pattern on the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered colonnade with ornate marble walls and statues. The Lighthouse of Alexandria is visible in the distance through the large columns, and the floor features intricate mosaic patterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: ceremonial courtyard with banquet tables and obelisks

events.description: turns right from colonnade into open courtyard with banquet tables

agents.ego_description: turning right to enter the open courtyard and approaching the food tables

notable_agents.action: standing near a banquet table arranging food items

entered.detail: long tables laden with fruits and ceremonial offerings
tall dark obelisk with hieroglyphic carvings
tall slender evergreen trees lining the courtyard
low boundary wall enclosing the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character turns into an open courtyard filled with banquet tables and tall cypress trees. An obelisk stands prominently against the pink sunset sky, and NPCs are gathered near the food tables.

scene_state.functional_zone: monument courtyard with tall obelisks against sunset sky

events.description: camera tilts upward to view obelisks and full moon against pink sky
camera tilts back down to ground level

agents.ego_description: tilting the camera up to admire the monuments and sky, then returning to ground level

entered.detail: second tall obelisk matching the first, framing the sky view
bright full moon visible in the pink sunset sky
crimson flags hanging from poles between the obelisks
classical statue atop a tall column

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts up to reveal a dramatic view of two tall obelisks and statues silhouetted against the pink sunset sky with a full moon. Red banners flutter between the monuments before the view returns to ground level.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with food tables and social gathering

events.description: begins walking through the courtyard passing groups of NPCs

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard past groups of people socializing near the banquet tables

notable_agents.action: group of three NPCs conversing near a food table
NPC in white robes walking across the courtyard

entered.detail: low stone boundary wall with greenery behind it
tall cypress trees visible beyond the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the active courtyard where NPCs gather around banquet tables laden with food. The obelisk remains visible in the background while people socialize in small groups.

events.description: re-enters the covered colonnade from the open courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking back through the colonnade toward the lighthouse

notable_agents.action: NPC walking toward the camera in the colonnade

entered.detail: ornate stone building wall returning to view
massive columns lining the walkway
lit torch on a tall stand illuminating the path

segments.scene_description: The character returns to the covered colonnade, leaving the open courtyard behind. The lighthouse becomes visible again straight ahead, and a torch brazier provides warm light as an NPC approaches from the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: outer promenade with palm trees and harbor view

events.description: turns left onto outer path lined with palm trees overlooking the harbor
passes a stone statue on a pedestal

agents.ego_description: walking along the outer path lined with palm trees with the lighthouse visible to the right

notable_agents.action: NPC walking ahead on the path toward the statue

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the outer wall
classical statue on a pedestal overlooking the harbor
low wall marking the edge of the promenade

segments.scene_description: The character turns onto an outer promenade lined with palm trees and overlooking the harbor. A stone statue stands on a pedestal ahead, and the lighthouse is visible to the right across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner temple courtyard with ceremonial architecture

events.description: turns left into the inner temple courtyard with ceremonial braziers

agents.ego_description: turning left into the inner courtyard and approaching the temple entrance with ceremonial decorations

entered.detail: grand temple entrance with triangular pediment and columns
large ceremonial urn near the entrance
dark fabric awning extending from the building

segments.scene_description: The character turns into an inner temple courtyard featuring a grand facade with a triangular pediment. Cypress trees and ceremonial urns decorate the space, and a lit brazier stands in the center of the mosaic floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the sheltered marble halls of a temple complex into open sunset courtyards and finally toward a grand inner sanctuary. It begins within a covered colonnade of ornate walls and mosaic floors, where the Lighthouse of Alexandria is glimpsed between massive columns before the camera turns into an open courtyard filled with banquet tables and cypress trees. As the view tilts upward to capture towering obelisks and red banners silhouetted against a pink sunset sky and a full moon, the perspective returns to ground level to navigate through socializing crowds. The camera then retreats back through the colonnade past a warm torch brazier, shifting toward an outer promenade lined with palm trees that overlooks the harbor and the distant lighthouse. Finally, the movement turns inward toward a grand temple facade featuring a triangular pediment, ceremonial urns, and a lit brazier centered on a mosaic floor.
